default_body.markdown:
## Notes:
- Since version 26.2+, Mojang has introduced the Vulkan rendering engine. If your device does **not** support **Vulkan 1.2**, please do **not** use the **Vulkan backend** to launch the latest version of Minecraft.

## Updates:
- [GP#1316](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1316): Added support for background blur/foreground blur effects (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1320](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1320): Apply theme colors to native dialogs (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1330](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1330): Localized cape Builder and Crafter (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1333](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1333): Added more hotbar interactions: double-tap to swap to offhand, long-press to drop (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1340](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1340): Localized more network error interpretations (by @MovTery)

## Refactors:
- [GP#1303](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1303): Upgraded AGP and dependencies, enabled R8 to optimize launcher performance (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1303](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1303): Removed StringFog library, replaced with BuildKeys library to dynamically generate configuration classes (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1303](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1303): Manually record launcher log tags (by @MovTery)

## Changes:
- [GP#1290](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1290): Improved reliability of account skin/cape downloads (by @dryfish09)
- [GP#1312](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1312): No longer repeat line prefixes when logging game environment information (by @MovTery)
- [Main#1c65a20](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/commit/1c65a2064acf278aff9c82244585588f85f2a12a): Language: Revised English source text (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1342](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1342): Record package architecture information in launcher logs/crash reports (by @MovTery)

## Fixes:
- [GP#1303](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1303): Fixed multi-architecture builds not cleaning up redundant Jre25 architectures (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1304](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1304): Crash when requesting permissions on systems that do not support "Manage all device files" permission (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1305](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1305): Version list component issues in the main menu (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1321](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1321): Fixed MIME type filtering for imports from the in-game directory menu (by @sdf123098)
- [GP#1319](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1319): Fixed physical mouse event handling (by @MovTery)

bodies.markdown:
## 提示：
- 26.2+ Mojang 引入了 Vulkan 渲染引擎，若您的设备不支持 **Vulkan 1.2**，请勿使用 **Vulkan 后端**启动 Minecraft 最新版本


## 更新：
- [GP#1316](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1316)：支持为背景设置背景模糊效果/前景模糊效果 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1320](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1320)：为原生对话框应用主题配色 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1330](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1330)：本地化披风 Builder、Crafter (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1333](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1333)：支持更多快捷栏交互：双击切换副手，长按丢弃 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1340](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1340)：本地化更多网络错误解读 (by @MovTery)


## 重构：
- [GP#1303](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1303)：升级 AGP 与依赖库，启用 R8 优化启动器性能 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1303](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1303)：移除 StringFog 库，改用 BuildKeys 库动态生成配置类 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1303](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1303)：手动记录启动器日志的标签 (by @MovTery)


## 调整：
- [GP#1290](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1290)：提高账号皮肤/披风下载的可靠性 (by @dryfish09)
- [GP#1312](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1312)：日志输出游戏环境信息时，不再重复输出行首标注 (by @MovTery)
- [Main#1c65a20](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/commit/1c65a2064acf278aff9c82244585588f85f2a12a)：语言：修订英文原文 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1342](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1342)：在启动器日志/崩溃报告中记录安装包架构信息 (by @MovTery)


## 修复：
- [GP#1303](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1303)：修复多架构构建未清理冗余 Jre25 架构的问题 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1304](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1304)：系统不支持“管理设备所有文件”权限时，申请权限导致崩溃 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1305](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1305)：主菜单内，版本列表组件相关的问题 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1321](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1321)：修复游戏内目录菜单导入的 MIME 类型过滤 (by @sdf123098)
- [GP#1319](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1319)：修复实体鼠标事件处理 (by @MovTery)
